nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { message, model (optional), temperature (optional), max_tokens (optional), channel (optional) }

nodes.name: Discord Output
nodes.comment: Sends response to Discord. Truncates to 1800 chars to stay under Discord's 2000 char limit.

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Sends error notification. Uses $input.all()[0].error to access error details from error flow.
